title: Exceptions, Cleanup, and Context Managers · Runtime Lens: Python Failure Observability
summary: Make the resource inventory survive invalid records, unavailable files, and partial operations. Planned artifact: Add and verify the python failure observability increment in a failure-resilient inventory importer. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Log actionable context without secrets, preserve tracebacks, and distinguish user messages from operator evidence.
Use with and context-manager protocols to guarantee acquisition and release across success and failure.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
